repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Correspondence,reviews, presentations, and publications, relating to Maynes' work in the Dept. of Policy Analysis and Management (formerly the Dept. of Consumer Economics and Housing) and in consumer policy making and survey research methodology.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor emeritus of Policy Analysis and Management, Cornell University.

Scott Maynes attended Springfield College in 1940, entered the U.S. Army Air Force in January 1943, and was discharged in December 1945. He received a B.S. in Social Sciences from Springfield College in 1947, an M.A. in Economics from Wesleyan University in 1949 and a Ph.D. in Economics from the University of Michigan in 1956. His career spanned 18 years in Economics at the University of Minnesota and 17 years in Consumer Economics at Cornell.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence,reviews, presentations, and publications, relating to Maynes' work in the Dept. of Policy Analysis and Management (formerly the Dept. of Consumer Economics and Housing) and in consumer policy making and survey research methodology.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series VI. University Related Material Box 4

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Scott Maynes papers, #23-26-3671. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
